# Version, asset, index lookup, and resolver workflows through the real CLI.
exec pinax init vault --title Vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"vault.init"'

exec pinax note new Yeisme --body 'registered note body' --slug yeisme --vault vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"note.new"'

exec pinax note show yeisme --vault vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"note.show"'
stdout 'yeisme.md'

exec pinax metadata plan yeisme --vault vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"metadata.plan"'
stdout '"writes":"false"'
stdout 'yeisme.md'

cp yeisme-draft.md vault/notes/yeisme-draft.md
cp draft.md vault/notes/draft.md
cp shared-a.md vault/notes/shared-a.md
cp shared-b.md vault/notes/shared-b.md

exec pinax asset add diagram.png --vault vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"asset.add"'
stdout '"path":"assets/diagram.png"'
! stdout 'raw-diff-secret'
! stdout 'provider-payload'

exec pinax index refresh --vault vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"index.refresh"'
stdout '"index_status":"fresh"'

exec pinax index lookup yeisme --scope all --vault vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"index.lookup"'
stdout '"object_kind":"note"'
stdout '"object_kind":"file"'
stdout '"managed_status":"registered"'
stdout '"managed_status":"adoptable"'

exec pinax index lookup diagram --kind asset --scope all --vault vault --agent
! stderr .
stdout 'command=index.lookup'
stdout 'fact.kind=asset'
stdout 'candidate.1.object_kind=asset'
stdout 'candidate.1.path=assets/diagram.png'

exec pinax record adopt yeisme --plan --vault vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"record.adopt"'
stdout '"writes":"false"'
stdout 'notes/yeisme-draft.md'

! exec pinax record adopt shared --plan --vault vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"record.adopt"'
stdout '"code":"vault_object_ref_ambiguous"'
stdout 'notes/shared-a.md'
stdout 'notes/shared-b.md'

exec pinax version snapshot --vault vault --message checkpoint --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"version.snapshot"'
stdout '"version_backend":"local"'
stdout '"snapshot_id"'

exec pinax version status --vault vault --agent
! stderr .
stdout 'command=version.status'
stdout 'fact.version_backend=local'
stdout 'fact.last_snapshot_id='

! exec pinax version diff --base raw-diff-secret --target provider-payload --vault vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"version.diff"'
stdout '"code":"version_read_unavailable"'
! stdout 'raw-diff-secret'
! stdout 'provider-payload'
! stdout '@@'
! stdout 'Authorization'

! exec pinax index refresh --changed-since fake-revision --vault vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"index.refresh"'
stdout '"code":"version_changed_paths_unavailable"'
! stdout 'fake-revision'

exists vault/.pinax/version/snapshots
exists vault/.pinax/assets/manifest.json
exists vault/.pinax/index.sqlite

-- diagram.png --
pinax-binary raw-diff-secret provider-payload
-- yeisme-draft.md --
# Yeisme Draft

unmanaged duplicate candidate
-- draft.md --
# Draft

draft unmanaged markdown
-- shared-a.md --
# Shared A

shared unmanaged markdown
-- shared-b.md --
# Shared B

shared unmanaged markdown
